title: Damage Charts
description:
Live in-combat damage analytics overlay: an always-on per-round dealt/taken bar chart, a hotkey-toggled (default C) breakdown of damage dealt and taken by source (cards, Poison, Doom, etc.), and an end-of-run recap. Single-player and multiplayer. Standalone — depends on no other mod.

Note: by-source attribution for damage-over-time, relics, orbs, and potions ships disabled by default for stability, so that damage is labelled generically (Status/Other); opt in via the source_hooks config at your own risk. All other stats are always tracked.
